title: GetResponse vs Moosend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare GetResponse vs Moosend: pricing, features, automation, and more to find the best email marketing tool for your needs.
intro: GetResponse and Moosend are both popular freemium email marketing platforms with strong automation capabilities. While GetResponse excels as a comprehensive all-in-one marketing platform with webinars and courses, Moosend focuses on delivering affordable, unlimited email sending for small businesses. Your choice depends on whether you need advanced features like webinars or prioritize budget-friendly unlimited emails.
choose_a_if: You need webinar hosting and online course creation features
You run a conversion funnel or sales funnel-heavy business
You want an all-in-one marketing platform beyond email
choose_b_if: You need unlimited email sending at the lowest possible cost
You're a small business focused purely on email marketing
You want double the free subscriber limit (1,000 vs 500)

faq.a: GetResponse is better overall due to its comprehensive feature set including webinars, landing pages, online courses, and conversion funnels, earning it a higher G2 rating (4.2 vs 4.7). However, Moosend has better customer satisfaction ratings on Trustpilot (4.4 vs 3.7) and excels for those seeking pure email marketing simplicity at the lowest cost.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, GetResponse or Moosend?
faq.a: Moosend is cheaper with paid plans starting at $9/month compared to GetResponse's $19/month. Additionally, Moosend offers unlimited emails on all paid plans, while GetResponse implements tiered email limits, making Moosend significantly more budget-friendly for high-volume senders.

faq.q: Can I switch from Moosend to GetResponse?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms typically support importing contact lists and email campaigns via CSV files or API integrations. You should export your subscriber data from Moosend and check GetResponse's import documentation to ensure a smooth migration, though some formatting adjustments may be needed.
